context: Agent was asked to execute a wave with mixed model tiers ('fast', 'smart', 'standard') and one phase with no Model value. The skill must resolve tier names to concrete model IDs via model-map.yaml. Evaluate whether the resolved model IDs are correct and the default ('standard' → 'sonnet') is applied for the blank cell.

checklist.name: haiku-for-delete-scripts
checklist.description: The Agent call for feat/delete-scripts uses model: 'haiku'

checklist.name: opus-for-cross-analysis
checklist.description: The Agent call for feat/cross-analysis uses model: 'opus'

checklist.name: sonnet-for-update-docs
checklist.description: The Agent call for feat/update-docs uses model: 'sonnet'

checklist.name: sonnet-default-for-index-rebuild
checklist.description: The Agent call for feat/index-rebuild uses model: 'sonnet' (the default when Model cell is blank)

checklist.name: all-four-agents-spawned-in-parallel
checklist.description: All four Agent calls appear in a single response (parallel spawning)

checklist.name: no-model-override-or-substitution
checklist.description: No agent is given a model tier that differs from what is specified in the wave document (e.g. haiku phase does not receive sonnet or opus)
